---
name: Site Rule Request
about: Request optimized extraction for a specific website
title: 'site-rule: '
labels: site-rule
assignees: ''
---

**Website URL**
The site you want optimized extraction for (e.g., `https://docs.python.org`).

**What content should be extracted?**
Describe the main content area (e.g., documentation body, forum posts, article text).

**What should be removed?**
Elements that are noise on this site (e.g., sidebar navigation, table of contents, footer links).

**CSS selectors (if known)**
If you know the CSS selectors for the main content, share them here.
